hi.text: Hello! 👋 #addreply hello&Hi, how are you? 😊 #addreply hey&Hey there! 😎 #addreply good morning&Good morning everyone! ☀️ #addreply good night&Sweet dreams! 🌙 #addreply bye&Goodbye! 👋 #addreply thanks&You're welcome! ❤️ #addreply thank you&No problem! 😊 #addreply bot&Yes, I'm here! 🤖 #addreply ping&Pong! 🏓 #addreply owner&Please contact the owner. #addreply help&Type #help for commands. #addreply ff&BOOYAH! 🔥 #addreply free fire&Who's ready for a match? 🎮 #addreply cod&Lock and load! 🎯 #addreply game&What's your favorite game? #addreply anime&Anime is life! 🔥 #addreply naruto&Believe it! 🍥 #addreply one piece&The One Piece is real! ☠️ #addreply joke&Why did the phone wear glasses?
